FontString.name: $parentGroupText
FontString.text: A group has been formed for:

Scripts.OnClick: if roleCheckTank:IsEnabled() == 1 then if roleCheckTank:GetChecked() == 1 then roleCheckTank:SetChecked(false) LFGsetRole('', true, true) else roleCheckTank:SetChecked(true) LFGsetRole('tank', true, true) end end

if roleCheckHealer:IsEnabled() == 1 then if roleCheckHealer:GetChecked() == 1 then roleCheckHealer:SetChecked(false) LFGsetRole('', true, true) else roleCheckHealer:SetChecked(true) LFGsetRole('healer', true, true) end end

if roleCheckDamage:IsEnabled() == 1 then if roleCheckDamage:GetChecked() == 1 then roleCheckDamage:SetChecked(false) LFGsetRole('', true, true) else roleCheckDamage:SetChecked(true) LFGsetRole('damage', true, true) end end
if RoleTank:IsEnabled() == 1 then RoleTank:SetChecked(not RoleTank:GetChecked()) LFGsetRole('tank', RoleTank:GetChecked()) end
if RoleHealer:IsEnabled() == 1 then RoleHealer:SetChecked(not RoleHealer:GetChecked()) LFGsetRole('healer', RoleHealer:GetChecked()) end
if RoleDamage:IsEnabled() == 1 then RoleDamage:SetChecked(not RoleDamage:GetChecked()) LFGsetRole('damage', RoleDamage:GetChecked()) end

Scripts.OnEnter: GameTooltip:SetOwner(this, "ANCHOR_RIGHT") GameTooltip:AddLine("Class Run - Tier 0 Dungeons", 1, 1, 1) GameTooltip:AddLine("Limit your group to one player per class.", 1, 0.82, 0, true) GameTooltip:AddLine("Groups take longer to form but each player gets a fair shot at class set gear.", 0.7, 0.7, 0.7, true) GameTooltip:Show()

FontString.name: $parentNoPeople
FontString.text: No players are looking for groups at the moment.

Scripts.OnEditFocusLost: if this:GetText() == "" then this:SetText("Search...") end LFG.grp_searchText = this:GetText() == "Search..." and "" or this:GetText() LFG.Grp_UpdateBrowse()
Scripts.OnEnterPressed: LFG.grp_searchText = this:GetText() == "Search..." and "" or this:GetText() LFG.Grp_UpdateBrowse() this:ClearFocus()
